title: helichrysum oligopappum
intro: Helichrysum oligopappum, also known as the mountain daisy or yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum oligopappum include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Helichrysum oligopappum can be prepared as an essential oil, herbal tea, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
